title: Tutorial screen to Onboarding screen
scenario: Tutorial screen navigation to Onboarding screen displays correct start page with proper image and text per Figma design
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. If this is a fresh install or first launch, observe the Tutorial screen.
3. Navigate through the Tutorial screen (e.g., swipe or tap 'Next' as applicable) until the option to proceed to Onboarding appears.
4. Tap the button or link to proceed from the Tutorial screen to the Onboarding screen.
5. Observe the Onboarding start page that is displayed.
expected: The correct start Onboarding page is displayed with the proper image and text as specified in the Figma design.
